column1: # partitions_c6_8mb.csv — custom 8 MB layout for the ESP32-C6-Touch-LCD-1.47.
# Total flash on the C6-1.47 = 8 MB (0x800000). The S3-2.06 uses the 32 MB
# partitions.csv in this folder; this is the C6 equivalent. SELECT IT in the IDE:
# Tools > Partition Scheme can't point at an arbitrary file
#   (a) set the board's "Partition Scheme" to "Custom" and ensure the IDE picks
#       up this file (rename to partitions.csv per build)
#   (b) add a build.partitions entry — see board_ws_c6_touch_lcd_147.h notes.
# CRITICAL — the same fixed-offset rules as the 32 MB table apply (or BLACK
# SCREEN): partition table at 0x8000
# the app .bin at 0x10000 (so app0 starts at exactly 0x10000). NVS stays 20 KB.
# Sizing: the compiled app is ~2.15 MB
column2: so 2 MB slots are TOO SMALL. Dual 3 MB

column1: # OTA slots give ~40% headroom and keep OTA possible; the rest is on-flash FAT.
# app partitions start on a 64 KB (0x10000) boundary; nothing exceeds 0x800000.
